title: verbascum majale var. bicolor
intro: Verbascum majale var. bicolor, also known as mullein, is a biennial plant in the figwort family that is native to Europe and Asia. The leaves and flowers of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Verbascum majale var. bicolor include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as soothing skin irritations and wounds. The herbal preparations of mullein include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to make cough syrups, skin creams, and wound treatments.
